heading: Interest on certain overpayments and underpayments
label: 1677g Interest on certain overpayments and underpayments
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a)(1), is defined in to mean section 1330 as in effect on the day before .Section 1303 of this titlesection 1677(26) of this titleJan. 1, 1995The Antidumping Act, 1921, referred to in subsec. (a)(2), is , , which was classified generally to sections 160 to 171 of this title, and was repealed by , , .act May 27, 1921, ch. 14, title II42 Stat. 11Pub. L. 96–39, title I, § 106(a)93 Stat. 193July 26, 1979

Amendments1986—Subsec. (b). substituted “Internal Revenue Code of 1986” for “Internal Revenue Code of 1954”, which for purposes of codification was translated as “title 26” thus requiring no change in text.Pub. L. 99–5141984—Subsec. (a). amended subsec. (a) generally, substituting provisions making interest payable on and after the date of publication of a countervailing or antidumping duty order under this subtitle or or the date of a finding under the Antidumping Act, 1921 for provisions making interest payable on and after the date on which notice of an affirmative determination by the Commission under section 1671d(b) or 1673d(b) of this title with respect to such merchandise was published.Pub. L. 98–573section 1303 of this titleSubsec. (b). amended subsec. (b) generally, substituting provisions that the rate of interest payable under subsec. (a) for any period of time is the rate of interest established under for such period for provision that the rate at which such interest was payable would be 8 percent per annum or, if higher, the rate in effect under on the date on which the rate or amount of the duty was finally determined.Pub. L. 98–573section 6621 of title 26section 6621 of title 26

children.text: the date of publication of a countervailing or antidumping duty order under this subtitle or section 1303 of this title, or1See References in Text note below.1
the date of a finding under the Antidumping Act, 1921.

children.heading: Rate
children.label: b Rate
children.text: The rate of interest payable under subsection (a) for any period of time is the rate of interest established under for such period.section 6621 of title 26
